title: PID 1, Signals, Shutdown, Health, Restart, and Resource Constraints · Container-System Defense
summary: A release board compares fresh pid 1, signals, shutdown, health, restart, and resource constraints decisions and accepts only answers tied to observable image, container, build, or Compose evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for bounded process lifecycle and health policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace PID 1 signal handling, child reaping, shell wrappers, init helpers, stop signals, and grace periods.
Design readiness removal, graceful shutdown, deadlines, forced termination, exit codes, and durable-work recovery.
Create bounded healthchecks with start period, interval, timeout, retries, useful output, and a scope distinct from restart or dependency readiness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping · changed case · Quiz Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz queue worker ignores SIGTERM, leaves child processes, reports healthy while stalled, restarts forever, and consumes 256 MiB. Bound PID 1, health, shutdown, restart, and resources. Competency probe: Trace PID 1 signal handling, child reaping, shell wrappers, init helpers, stop signals, and grace periods.

Which action demonstrates Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping · changed case · Quiz Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace pid 1 signal handling, child reaping, shell wrappers, init helpers, stop signals, and grace periods. For Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping · changed case · Quiz Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping, keep Docker Pid1 Signal Reaping connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
